reference: I fell over a week ago and landed on my right knee a little bit hard. I have a small bruise and I also have a burning sensation. When I try to get up while using it, I can't put pressure on it. I can walk well with it. I can put my leg straight when I lie down but not for very long. I have put ice on it, though.
text: I fell over a week ago and landed on my right knee a little bit hard. I have a small bruise and I also have a burning pain. When I try to get up while using it, I can't put pressure on it. I can walk well with it. I keep my legs straight when I lie down, but not for very long. I have put ice on it though.
